query:
SELECT 'debt_target_cache' as tbl, section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM debt_target_cache GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'debt_collected_cache', section, COUNT(*) FROM debt_collected_cache GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'contracts', section, COUNT(*) FROM contracts GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payment_transactions', section, COUNT(*) FROM payment_transactions GROUP BY section;
